title: Smoky Basil Gougere Bites
description: A flavorful twist on the classic French gougere, infused with Thai basil and a smoky heat.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour and a pinch of salt.
Add the Gruyère cheese and mix until well combined.
Add the unsalted butter and mix until a dough forms.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut out small squares of dough, about 1 inch per side.
Place a few Thai basil leaves on one half of each square, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the dough over the basil and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with smoked paprika.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
